mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_KAKAO_LINK ( user_id, kakao_user_id, access_token, refresh_token, access_token_expires_at, refresh_token_expires_at, use_kakao_notify, linked_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{kakaoUserId}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{accessTokenExpiresAt}, #{refreshTokenExpiresAt}, #{useKakaoNotify}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_KAKAO_LINK SET kakao_user_id = #{kakaoUserId}, access_token = #{accessToken}, refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, access_token_expires_at = #{accessTokenExpiresAt}, refresh_token_expires_at = #{refreshTokenExpiresAt}, use_kakao_notify = #{useKakaoNotify}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
